narrative_text: Welcome to the Sparkling Salt-Spray Shore! Meet Barnaby, a tiny crab with a giant golden shell, who has just discovered a shimmering, mysterious object tucked inside a deep tide pool.
branch_summary: Help Barnaby the crab explore the magical secrets of the sun-drenched tide pools.
scene_description: A vibrant, wide-angle view of a tropical coastline at low tide. The scene is bathed in brilliant, warm morning sunlight that creates dancing reflections on the water's surface. The color palette is dominated by turquoise water, pale golden sand, and the deep purples and pinks of sea life. The composition focuses on a large, central tide pool surrounded by textured rock formations.
background_description: Themed outdoor location. A serene beach at low tide with a wide expanse of pale, fine-grained golden sand meeting a calm turquoise ocean under a clear, bright azure sky. In the mid-ground, a series of flat, dark volcanic rock shelves create natural enclosures for water. The lighting is crisp and bright, casting short, sharp shadows that define the craggy edges of the stone basins.

properties.color: bright sunset orange with a metallic gold-colored shell
properties.size: small, roughly the size of a grapefruit
properties.texture: smooth, glossy chitin with a bumpy, calcified shell surface
properties.pattern: speckled white dots on the tips of the claws
properties.distinctive_features: one oversized right claw tipped in polished black, and large, expressive indigo-blue stalk eyes

entities.pose: standing tall on six spindly legs, left claw tucked inward, right oversized claw pointing forward with the pincer slightly open, stalk eyes tilted toward the water

properties.color: translucent teal water with a sandy beige bottom
properties.size: medium, spanning a significant portion of the foreground
properties.texture: rippling liquid surface with submerged jagged rock edges
properties.pattern: swirling patterns of white sea foam at the edges
properties.distinctive_features: filled with crystal clear water, showing colorful pebbles and tiny dancing air bubbles at the bottom

entities.pose: stationary and flat, with a gently undulating water surface reflecting the sky

properties.color: deep magenta with neon violet accents
properties.size: small, about the size of a saucer
properties.texture: rough, knobby skin with tiny suction-cup tube feet underneath
properties.pattern: symmetrical radial bumps along each of its five arms
properties.distinctive_features: five thick, tapered arms with one arm slightly curled upward at the very tip

entities.pose: lying flat and spread out, with one arm slightly arched upward away from the surface

properties.color: olive green with translucent amber edges
properties.pattern: long parallel veins running down the length of each frond
properties.distinctive_features: small, air-filled bulbs at the base of the leaves that help them float

entities.pose: draped loosely over a rock edge, with several long fronds trailing down into the water
